case_title: SCHWARTZ, ALLAN ESQ. VS SEMPELL, PENNIE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEMPELL, PENNIE
COPY OF REQUEST FOR ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY THE BAR ASSOC.OF S.F.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-28-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-08-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN ESQ. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEMPELL, PENNIE $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED IS AUG.8,2000 3:30 PM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SEMPELL, PENNIE

DECLARATION OF CONNIE MOORE DUNNING IN SUPPORT OF LIFTING A STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED.
